event.name: FA Cup Round 5 — Arsenal vs Manchester City (2026)

context.pre_match_notes: FA Cup R5. Arsenal home. City squad rotation expected — manager confirmed in press conference that 4 first-choice starters rested for upcoming UCL leg. Arsenal full strength, league position requires FA Cup progress for European qualification next season. Congestion modifier applicable to City.

question: Predict match direction. How does squad rotation affect the signal for the stronger team?
